task_completion.description: Navigate to the properties of the target zone in the eQUEST model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST interface is open, and the 'East Perim Zn (G.E12)' zone is selected in the project tree or its specific Zone Properties dialog box is open.

task_completion.description: Set the Throttling Range for the target zone to 0.5°F.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zone Properties dialog for 'East Perim Zn (G.E12)', the 'Throttling Range' field is visible and set to a value of 0.5 (acceptable tolerance +/- 0.05).

task_completion.description: Set the Outside Air (OA) Flow/Area for the target zone to 1.0 CFM/ft².
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zone Properties dialog for 'East Perim Zn (G.E12)', the 'OA Flow/Area' field (or equivalent area-based ventilation parameter) is visible and set to a value of 1.0 (acceptable tolerance +/- 0.05).

task_completion.description: Run the full annual DOE-2.2 simulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A simulation progress window, a 'Simulation completed successfully' dialog, or the eQUEST results viewer showing newly generated reports is visible on screen.
The agent clicks the 'Save' icon, uses the File -> Save menu option, or a confirmation dialog for saving the project is visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the eQUEST graphical user interface to make changes rather than directly editing the .inp file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with eQUEST application windows and dialog boxes, not a text editor like Notepad or VS Code.

integrity.description: The agent applied changes only to the target zone, not globally.
integrity.visual_evidence: The properties dialogs being edited clearly indicate they are for 'East Perim Zn (G.E12)' specifically, rather than a global default, building-wide parameter, or parent system level that cascades to all zones.

integrity.description: The simulation was actually executed within eQUEST.
integrity.visual_evidence: The DOE-2 simulation calculation window or progress bar appears on screen during the trajectory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The actual zone name in the eQUEST model is 'East Perim Zn (G.E12)', despite the task description referring to 'G.East Perim Zn'. The target values are 0.5°F for Throttling Range and 1.0 CFM/ft² for OA Flow/Area. These parameters might need to be explicitly added or changed from existing parameters (like OA-FLOW/PER) in the eQUEST GUI. A tolerance of 0.05 is acceptable for the numerical values.
